ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to (e.g., Western Europe) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "happiness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on happiness score */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the happiness score */,
  "survey_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the happiness data */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("happiness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_factors" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social factor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "family" REAL /* Family factor for the country */,
  "health" REAL /* Health factor for the country */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom factor for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social data */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level in the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Level of social support in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_factors" (
  "environmental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental factor */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "ecological_footprint" REAL /* Ecological footprint of the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the environmental data */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index of the country */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environmental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "corruption_level" REAL /* Corruption level in the country */,
  "trust_in_government" REAL /* Trust in government in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the policy data */,
  "policy_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of government policies */,
  "public_spending" REAL /* Public spending as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dystopia_residuals" (
  "dystopia_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dystopia residual */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "dystopia_residual" REAL /* Dystopia residual for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the dystopia residual data */,
  "dystopia_causes" TEXT /* Causes contributing to the dystopia residual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dystopia_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dystopia_residuals_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity level */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "generosity_level" REAL /* Generosity level in the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the generosity data */,
  "donation_rate" REAL /* Rate of charitable donations in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policymaker) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent information */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the researcher */,
  "publications" INTEGER /* Number of publications by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the analyst belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the analyst */,
  "analytical_tools" TEXT /* Analytical tools used by the analyst */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policymakers" (
  "policymaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policymaker */,
  "policymaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the policymaker */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the policymaker belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the policymaker */,
  "policy_focus" TEXT /* Policy focus areas of the policymaker */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience in policy-making */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policymaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was last modified */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
